name: Plausible Analytics
description: Monitor Plausible Analytics sites for privacy-compliant web analytics

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Plausible at https://plausible.io
2. Go to Account Settings → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Plausible → Account Settings → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Plausible Analytics sites and verifies access management

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Plausible Analytics is actively tracking site availability
